title: Robinhood Chain draws over $3 billion in weekly DEX volume to join top five chains
message_html: Robinhood Chain draws over $3 billion in weekly DEX volume to join top five chains ...
snippet: Robinhood Chain hit $3.1B in weekly DEX volume and 65K users since its July 1 launch, as the Layer 2 eyes tokenized markets, Bernstein said.
